HOME AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi; the llth July, 1995 G.S.R. 352(E).--In exercise of the powers conferred by section 3 of the public primises (Eviction of Unauthorised occupants) Act, 1971 (40 of 1971), the Central Government hereby appoints the officers mentioned in column (1) of the Table below, being officer equivalent to the rank of gazetted officers of Government, to be estate officers for the purpose of the aaid Act, who shall exercise the powers conferred an@ perform the duties imposed on estate officer by or under the said act, within the local limits of their respective jurisdiction in respect of the Public Premises specified in the corresponding entries in Column (2) of the said Table :-- . TABLE. Designation of the Categories cf Public Bremises and officer local limits jurisdiction o {a) Commandant Staff of Premises under the administrative Directorate General, Control/disposal of Indo-Tibetan ITB Police Force Border Police Force situated within the local limits of New Delhi/Delhi. (b) Commandant Staff of Premises under the administrative Sector HQrs, ITB control of Indo-fibetan Border Police Force Police FPorce situated within the locai limits of Sector HOrs. (c) Adjutant of the ITs Premises under the administrative Police Force Units control of Indo-Tibetan Border Police Force situated within the local limits of respective units. {No Pe-Le A501 T/AVBV9S40:AG (ITBPP)] Ss.
